title: Monsoon British Prawn Stir-fry
description: A sour and juicy monsoon-inspired dish featuring raw frozen prawns with a savory tadka base, suitable for egg-free diets.

ingredients.name: Sour ingredients: tamarind paste and lemon juice
ingredients.amount: Juice of 1 lemon and 1 tbsp tamarind paste

instructions: Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
Add chopped ginger and garlic to the pan. Stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not burnt.
If using red chili, add it now and stir for another 15 seconds to release its flavors.
Pour in the tamarind paste and lemon juice. Simmer gently for 2-3 minutes allowing the mixture to reduce slightly.
Add salt and sour ingredients based on taste preference; mix well.
Increase heat to high, add prawns to the pan and stir-fry until they turn opaque and pink (about 1 minute).
If using green peas, add them now and continue to stir for another 20 seconds. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Remove from heat immediately after final stir. Serve hot with steamed rice or naan bread.
